assessment.approach: The challenge requires initiating a session via POST /api/aurora/open, sending event data via POST /api/events, and finally closing the session via PUT /api/aurora/close to receive the accepted response. I will follow the observed pattern from the evidence.
uncertainties: The exact runId and signal values are dynamic and must be extracted from the response of the open request.
